brand-story-img-a7b2c1.query: Our Story Velmora was born from a simple belief: every woman deserves jewelry that feels as special as the moments she wears it for. We design demi-fine pieces that bridge the gap between costume and fine jewelry — real gold plating, genuine craftsmanship, and prices that don't require a special occasion.
